What is the speed of light? 🚀

The speed of light in a vacuum is approximately 299,792,458 m/s.

In scientific notation: 3 × 10⁸ m/s.

  • Symbol: c
  • Exact value: 299,792,458 m/s (by definition since 1983)
SPEED_OF_LIGHT = 299_792_458  # metres per second
print(f"c = {SPEED_OF_LIGHT:,} m/s")

How long does light take to travel from the Sun to Earth?

About 8 minutes and 20 seconds on average.

The Earth–Sun distance is ~149.6 million km, which divided by c gives roughly 499 seconds.
